chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 79 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 10.02.2026 Mr. Amanullah G. Malik, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Nathu Lalwani, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Zuber Ahmed Rajput, Advocate for complainant along with complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Additional P.G. along with learned Counsel for the complainant does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of three months hereof. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
